import bpy, bmesh
bpy.ops.object.select_all(action='SELECT')
bpy.ops.object.delete(use_global=False)

bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_uv_sphere_add(radius=1, enter_editmode=False, align='WORLD', location=(0, 0, 0))
obj = bpy.context.active_object
bpy.ops.object.shade_smooth()

bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_uv_sphere_add(radius=0.5, enter_editmode=False, align='WORLD', location=(0.5, 0, 0.5))
ear1 = bpy.context.active_object
bpy.ops.object.shade_smooth()

bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_uv_sphere_add(radius=0.5, enter_editmode=False, align='WORLD', location=(-0.5, 0, 0.5))
ear2 = bpy.context.active_object
bpy.ops.object.shade_smooth()

bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cylinder_add(vertices=32, radius=0.2, depth=0.5, enter_editmode=False, align='WORLD', location=(0, -0.5, 0))
tail = bpy.context.active_object
bpy.ops.object.shade_smooth()

bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_uv_sphere_add(radius=0.1, enter_editmode=False, align='WORLD', location=(0, -0.5, -0.25))
tip = bpy.context.active_object
bpy.ops.object.shade_smooth()

bpy.ops.object.select_all(action='DESELECT')
obj.select_set(True)
ear1.select_set(True)
ear2.select_set(True)
tail.select_set(True)
tip.select_set(True)
bpy.ops.object.join()

mat = bpy.data.materials.new("PikachuMaterial")
mat.use_nodes = True
bsdf = mat.node_tree.nodes["Principled BSDF"]
bsdf.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (1, 1, 0, 1)
obj.data.materials.append(mat)

bpy.ops.object.select_all(action='DESELECT')
obj.select_set(True)
bpy.context.view_layer.objects.active = obj
